title: Sculk Blast
description: This Data Pack Adds A New Powerful Item You Can Craft With A Crafting Table.
body:
**- This Data Pack Adds A New Powerful Item You Can Craft With A Crafting Table, This Item Lets You The Power Have The Wardens Sonic Boom To Cover Your With Sculk And To Kill Mobs Or Players, Note The Sonic Boom Item Does Not Insta Kill Players Or Every Mob.**

- To Use This Awesome Item Right Click With It Select In Your Mainhand Or Offhand, Also It Has A 10 Second Cooldown, And The Sonic Blast You Will Go Up To 64 Blocks.
 
**functions:**

/function sculk_blast:give/normal

/function sculk_blast:give/infinite
